tools.name: vipari.list_repos
tools.title: List workspace repositories
tools.description: List repositories allocated to the authenticated workspace with lightweight posture context.

tools.name: vipari.get_repo_posture
tools.title: Get repository posture
tools.description: Return the current review posture, top reasons, and next action for one workspace-visible repository.

tools.name: vipari.get_repo_casefile
tools.title: Get repository case file
tools.description: Return a compact repository case file with baseline status, leading findings, and review targets.

tools.name: vipari.list_escalations
tools.title: List workspace escalations
tools.description: Return the workspace escalation queue with review-now and optional watch items.
